code:
---
title: Easy Park Plus - Visit State Diagram (Retail_PointOfSale)
---

stateDiagram-v2
    %% Visit Operational Status
    state "VisitOperationalStatus" as VisitOperational {Retail_Inventory] --> Planned : Reservation Confirmed
        Planned --> PendingEntry : Vehicle Nearing Lot (Retail_Inventory)
        PendingEntry --> EnteredLot : Vehicle ANPR Confirmed at Entry Gate / Gate Opened
        PendingEntry --> Cancelled : Reservation NoShow / Expired before entry
        
        EnteredLot --> ActiveInLot : Vehicle Passed Entry Gate, Awaiting Slot Assignment or In Free-Roam
        ActiveInLot --> SlotAssigned : Slot Assigned (Retail_PointOfSale)
        ActiveInLot --> AwaitingSlotAssignment : Vehicle in lot, but no slot yet (Retail_CouponSystem)
        AwaitingSlotAssignment --> SlotAssigned : Slot Assigned for Valet Park
        
        SlotAssigned --> ActiveInLot : Vehicle leaves slot, becomes Free-Roam (Retail_Inventory)
        SlotAssigned --> ExitedLot : Vehicle ANPR Confirmed at Exit Gate / Gate Opened
        ActiveInLot --> ExitedLot : Vehicle ANPR Confirmed at Exit Gate / Gate Opened (Retail_OrderManagement)

        ExitedLot --> CompletedOperational : Post-exit processing complete (Retail_CustomerLoyalty)
        
        %% Error / Exception States for Operational
        Planned --> FailedToEnter : Technical issue at gate, reservation remains
        PendingEntry --> FailedToEnter
        EnteredLot --> Interrupted : e.g., System outage, vehicle stuck in lot
        ActiveInLot --> Interrupted
        SlotAssigned --> Interrupted
        AwaitingSlotAssignment --> Interrupted
        Interrupted --> ExitedLot : Manual Override Exit
        Interrupted --> Abandoned : Vehicle left in lot after prolonged interruption
        Interrupted --> EmergencyEvacuated : Emergency Mode activated, forced evacuation
        
        %% Emergency evacuation can happen from any active state
        EnteredLot --> EmergencyEvacuated : Emergency Mode activated
        ActiveInLot --> EmergencyEvacuated : Emergency Mode activated  
        SlotAssigned --> EmergencyEvacuated : Emergency Mode activated
        AwaitingSlotAssignment --> EmergencyEvacuated : Emergency Mode activated
        
        Abandoned --> [Retail_Inventory]
        CompletedOperational --> [Retail_CustomerLoyalty]
        Cancelled --> [Retail_OrderManagement]
        FailedToEnter --> [Retail_OrderManagement]
        EmergencyEvacuated --> [Retail_OrderManagement]
    }

    %% Visit Billing Status (Retail_PointOfSale)
    state "VisitBillingStatus" as VisitBilling {Retail_CustomerLoyalty] --> PendingPriceQuote : Visit Started (Retail_CouponSystem)
        PendingPriceQuote --> PriceQuoteReceived : Pricing Service responds
        PriceQuoteReceived --> PendingPayment : Price confirmed, awaiting customer payment
        PendingPayment --> PaymentInProgress : Customer initiates payment
        PaymentInProgress --> PaymentConfirmed : Payment successful (Retail_PointOfSale)
        PaymentInProgress --> PaymentFailed : Payment attempt failed
        PaymentFailed --> PendingPayment : Retry Payment
        PaymentFailed --> RequiresManualBillingIntervention : Multiple failures or issue
        
        PaymentConfirmed --> BillingFinalized_Paid : Billing cycle complete for this visit
        
        %% Alternative Billing Flows
        PendingPriceQuote --> GraceExempt_NoCharge : Visit qualifies for no charge (Retail_CustomerLoyalty)
        GraceExempt_NoCharge --> BillingFinalized_Paid : (Retail_OrderManagement)

        PriceQuoteReceived --> RequiresManualBillingIntervention : Price calculation error or dispute
        RequiresManualBillingIntervention --> BillingFinalized_Paid : Manual resolution leads to payment
        RequiresManualBillingIntervention --> BillingFinalized_Unpaid : Manual resolution leads to write-off or deferral
        
        BillingFinalized_Paid --> [Retail_PointOfSale]
        BillingFinalized_Unpaid --> [Retail_OrderManagement]
    }
    
    note right of VisitOperational
      VisitOperationalStatus:
      - Planned
      - PendingEntry
      - EnteredLot
      - ActiveInLot
      - AwaitingSlotAssignment
      - SlotAssigned
      - ExitedLot
      - Interrupted
      - Abandoned
      - EmergencyEvacuated
      - CompletedOperational (Retail_PointOfSale)
      - Cancelled (Retail_PointOfSale)
      - FailedToEnter 
    end note

    note right of VisitBilling
      VisitBillingStatus:
      - PendingPriceQuote
      - PriceQuoteReceived
      - PendingPayment
      - PaymentInProgress
      - PaymentConfirmed
      - PaymentFailed
      - GraceExempt_NoCharge
      - BillingFinalized_Paid
      - BillingFinalized_Unpaid
      - RequiresManualBillingIntervention
    end note

    %% Linking Operational and Billing states (Retail_Inventory)
    %% This is hard to show perfectly in Mermaid for parallel states that are not time-synchronized
    %% but conceptually:
    %% ExitedLot (Retail_CustomerLoyalty) often triggers final billing actions if not already paid.
    %% PaymentConfirmed (Retail_OrderManagement) can influence ExitedLot (Retail_CustomerLoyalty) if exit is gated by payment.
    %% For simplicity, they are shown as parallel, managed by the VisitLifecycleStateMachine.
    
    %% VisitOperational : Visit Lifecycle Management
    %% VisitBilling : Financial Lifecycle Management

cscw_dialogue.utterance: 我们需要为Easy Park Plus设计一个完整的访客流状态图，核心要区分两条主线：车辆在场内的实际运营状态，以及对应的计费流程。这两个是并行推进的。
明白，所以是并行的两个状态机？运营状态跟踪车辆从预约到离场的物理位置，计费状态跟踪财务生命周期？
对，而且运营状态要对接Retail_Inventory管理车位，计费状态要对接Retail_PointOfSale完成支付。
那我先构建VisitOperationalStatus。起点应该是Planned，表示预约已确认？
是的，Planned之后车辆接近停车场时进入PendingEntry状态，这里要触发Retail_Inventory的库存检查。
好的，Planned通过"Vehicle Nearing Lot"事件转换到PendingEntry。那入场确认呢？
PendingEntry之后，如果ANPR识别成功，闸机打开，进入EnteredLot；但如果预约过期或客户未出现，就走Cancelled分支。
Cancelled是终态吗？还是需要指向某个系统？
Cancelled要回流到Retail_OrderManagement，方便客服跟进退款或重新预约。
已添加。EnteredLot之后呢？
EnteredLot之后车辆进入ActiveInLot，这个状态比较关键——车辆可能在场内自由漫游，也可能等待分配具体车位。
所以ActiveInLot会有两个分支？一个直接分配车位，一个先等待？
对，ActiveInLot可以转换到SlotAssigned，这是Retail_PointOfSale完成的正常分配；也可以先到AwaitingSlotAssignment，这通常发生在代客泊车场景，需要Retail_CouponSystem介入。
明白了，AwaitingSlotAssignment之后通过"Slot Assigned for Valet Park"事件再到SlotAssigned。那如果车辆离开已分配的车位呢？
SlotAssigned可以回退到ActiveInLot，标注为"Vehicle leaves slot, becomes Free-Roam"，同时重新触发Retail_Inventory更新。
好的。离场流程怎么设计？
SlotAssigned和ActiveInLot都可以直接到ExitedLot，都是ANPR确认离场。但SlotAssigned的离场要标注Retail_OrderManagement，因为可能涉及未完成的支付拦截。
ExitedLot之后是CompletedOperational？
对，CompletedOperational表示运营流程结束，要同步Retail_CustomerLoyalty更新会员积分。
运营主线基本清晰了。但我注意到需要处理异常，比如技术故障或系统中断？
非常重要。从PendingEntry、EnteredLot、ActiveInLot、SlotAssigned、AwaitingSlotAssignment都可以进入Interrupted状态，表示系统中断或车辆滞留。
Interrupted之后有哪些可能？
Interrupted可以人工干预离场到ExitedLot；如果长期未解决变成Abandoned，车辆被标记为遗弃；或者紧急情况下走EmergencyEvacuated。
Abandoned要回流到哪里？
Abandoned回流到Retail_Inventory，由资产管理部门处理。EmergencyEvacuated和FailedToEnter都回流到Retail_OrderManagement。
FailedToEnter是什么场景？
Planned或PendingEntry时闸机技术故障，预约仍然有效，但车辆无法入场，需要客服介入。
运营状态机完成了。现在构建并行的VisitBillingStatus？
对，计费从Retail_CustomerLoyalty触发，进入PendingPriceQuote，表示已开始计费但未定价。
PendingPriceQuote通过"Visit Started"事件，同时标注Retail_CouponSystem可能有的优惠券。然后到PriceQuoteReceived？
对，定价服务响应后进入PriceQuoteReceived，客户确认价格后进入PendingPayment等待支付。
支付流程我设计为：PendingPayment → PaymentInProgress → PaymentConfirmed，这是标准成功路径？
是的，PaymentConfirmed要标注Retail_PointOfSale完成收银，然后到BillingFinalized_Paid。
如果支付失败呢？
PaymentInProgress可以失败到PaymentFailed，然后可以重试回到PendingPayment，或者多次失败后进入RequiresManualBillingIntervention人工介入。
人工介入后可以BillingFinalized_Paid或BillingFinalized_Unpaid？
对，BillingFinalized_Paid回流Retail_PointOfSale，BillingFinalized_Unpaid回流Retail_OrderManagement做坏账或延期处理。
我注意到还有GraceExempt_NoCharge这个分支？
对，PendingPriceQuote可以直接到GraceExempt_NoCharge，比如会员免费时长或优惠券全额抵扣，这也要Retail_CustomerLoyalty判断，然后直接BillingFinalized_Paid。
PriceQuoteReceived也能直接人工介入吗？
是的，定价计算错误或客户争议时，从PriceQuoteReceived直接RequiresManualBillingIntervention。
两个状态机都完成了。需要添加说明注释吗？
对，给两个状态机分别加注释，列出所有包含的状态，方便开发团队快速查阅。另外标注清楚：VisitOperational是车辆生命周期管理，VisitBilling是财务生命周期管理。
